messages.content: What is the single, absolute, one best AAS to add on top of the 200mg/weekly of testosterone I am already taking.
That depends on what you're looking for. I'm assuming you're looking for muscle building and strength gains?
I'm sorry, I don't have information about fat loss with testosterone.
